case_title: DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS VS ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $469.95 FILED BY DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC. $469.95 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $529.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO ANNE'S KITCHEN RETURNED, MOVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANNE'S KITCHEN, (SFO) INC.
